question_sentence: The British royal family announced that Prince George will be attending which school from September?
Which struggling restaurant chain has been sold to a private equity firm?
G7 leaders met this week for a summit in which French spa town?
Which streaming service did Fox announce it will acquire in a deal valued at $25 billion?
An oak tree connected with which legendary folk hero was confirmed to have died?
Ukraine’s largest-ever drone strike on Russian territory targeted an oil refinery in which city?
Leading Japanese retailers of which popular food have been accused of forming a “cartel”?
Ukraine and which other nation began EU accession talks this week?
According to an NBC News poll, what percentage of US adults believe their country’s best days are behind them?
How many goals were scored in the first 24 matches of the World Cup?
President Donald Trump signed a major agreement with which country this week?
evidence: Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian signed an initial agreement to end the US war with Iran. The 14-point document lays out terms for an extended ceasefire and continued peace talks between the two countries.

question_sentence: Which sports team held a championship parade this week?
evidence: The New York Knicks' first championship parade in more than 50 years took over Lower Manhattan this week, with thousands in attendance.

question_sentence: Which of the following was the first named storm of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season?
evidence: Tropical Storm Arthur, the first named storm of the season, weakened into a post-tropical cyclone this week, but still unleashed flooding threats across the Gulf Coast and the South.

question_sentence: The national average price for a gallon of regular gas fell below which key benchmark this week?
evidence: Gas prices fell to $3.999 per gallon this week, dropping below $4 for the first time since March, according to AAA.

question_sentence: Who is the most popular living president, according to recent polling data?
evidence: As Barack Obama welcomes visitors to his presidential center this week, he does so as the most popular living president. A new CNN poll found 57% of Americans view Obama favorably, compared with 34% for Trump and 30% for Biden.

question_sentence: Which country hosted world leaders at the Group of 7 summit this week?
evidence: The leaders of the world's most powerful nations met in France this week to discuss a range of geopolitical and economic challenges, including a US-Iran agreement and Russia’s war in Ukraine.

question_sentence: Which of the following are considered among the highest honors in the culinary world?
evidence: The James Beard Awards are among the highest honors a chef can receive, often turning acclaimed restaurants into must-visit destinations. A new class of winners was announced this week.

question_sentence: President Trump reached which birthday milestone this month?
evidence: Trump celebrated his 80th birthday on June 14. On the same day, he hosted a UFC fight at the White House as part of America's 250th anniversary celebration.

question_sentence: What is the title of Vice President JD Vance’s new book?
evidence: Vance’s new book “Communion” puts his Catholic faith at the center of his story — and his political future.

question_sentence: Director Steven Spielberg's latest film centers on which topic?
evidence: Spielberg’s “Disclosure Day” reflects his belief that there are other forms of intelligent life in the universe.
